title: 2025 11 04 Personal Training Approach
html:
TL;DR

  • Yahir's working PT playbook for his Austin bridge-income work: intake protocol → 20–30 min standard session flow → 10 named routines → body-part-specific exercise library → cool-down options → client-by-client notes.
  • Approach principles: work backwards from a loose goal, joint-friendly, willing to call audibles, ask clients about their music, frame cool-down as a "central nervous system downshift."
  • 30-second sit-to-stand, wall push-ups, single-leg balance form the intake test battery. Standard session = warm-up (3m) → main 3–5 exercises (15–20m) → cool-down + lifestyle tip.
  • 20-question health-coaching framework grouped under Motivation, Current State, Outcomes, Readiness, Support — used to find the true goal beneath surface "lose weight."
  • Live client roster captured: Hector (stability/coordination), Conrad (waistline + lower back), Jorge (push him hard).

Notes

The doc is functioning as Yahir's iPad-side reference during sessions — explicitly asks at the bottom whether to convert into a "one-page laminated-style PDF" with tabbed sections. Format reflects the working-doc pattern: drafts, exercise lists, client cheat-sheets, and one trailing note ("See trainer Tues") all coexist.

This is the operational backbone of how Yahir is paying Austin rent in late 2025 — he flagged in the Austin move plan that part-time PT would bridge income while he built rankett and brotein. By November 2025 the gig is real, repeated, and structured. The shift from "idea" (May) to "system" (November) is an activation loop proof.

Equipment universe: TRX suspension cables, kettlebells, resistance bands, dumbbells, bench, pull-up bar — gym-floor equipment available where he's working. Routines explicitly scale (closer-to-anchor for harder, away for easier) and include a "Gentle Rehab-Friendly" routine for older clients.

Connections

  • austin tx — work location
  • bridge income strategies — the financial role this gig plays
  • 60 day activation rule — May→Nov execution proof
  • anabolic scoring — adjacent fitness-framework concept
  • fitfo — Yahir's other body-systems thinking
